# BidDeed.AI

> AI-powered foreclosure auction intelligence by Everest Capital USA.

BidDeed.AI is an agentic AI ecosystem — not SaaS — built for Florida foreclosure and tax deed investing. It automates the entire auction workflow from discovery through disposition using the Everest Ascent™ 12-stage pipeline.

## What BidDeed.AI Does

- Automated lien discovery across 5+ public record sources (AcclaimWeb, RealTDM, BCPAO, Tax Collector, Clerk of Court)
- ML-powered bid recommendations: BID, REVIEW, or SKIP with confidence scores trained on 1,300+ historical auctions
- One-click DOCX auction reports with BCPAO photos, lien summaries, and max bid calculations
- Senior lien detection that catches HOA foreclosures where mortgages survive — the #1 trap for new investors
- 12-stage fully autonomous pipeline: Discovery → Scraping → Enrichment → Lien Search → Valuation → ML Scoring → Report Generation → Delivery

## Max Bid Formula

Max Bid = (ARV × 70%) - Repairs - $10K buffer - MIN($25K, 15% × ARV)

## Coverage

Currently: Brevard County, Florida (327,882 parcels verified)
Expanding: All 67 Florida counties via ZoneWise.AI zoning intelligence platform

## Companion Platform

ZoneWise.AI — Florida-wide zoning intelligence. Parcel-level zoning data, jurisdiction mapping, and land use analytics across all 67 Florida counties. Powers the location intelligence layer of BidDeed.AI.

Website: https://zonewise.ai

## Company

Everest Capital USA
Satellite Beach, Florida
Founded by Ariel Shapira — 10+ years foreclosure investing, licensed FL broker and general contractor
